_comment: Upstream originals the pack can fetch at install time. Do not replace these with ASP-authored summaries. Read each upstream README before install/update. The commit field is a last-reviewed reference, not a required install target. Licenses and notices must be copied alongside each installed component (see VENDORING.md).

sources.name: caveman
sources.author: Julius Brussee (JuliusBrussee)
sources.note: Canonical caveman skill. Read the upstream README first; use file/commit as last-reviewed location hints only.

sources.name: stop-slop
sources.author: Hardik Pandya (hardikpandya)
sources.note: Removes AI writing tells from prose. No bundled ASP rewrite — read the upstream README first, then copy only the upstream SKILL.md + required references as-is when the README calls for file copying.

sources.name: mattpocock/skills
sources.author: Matt Pocock (mattpocock)
sources.note: A collection of production engineering skills (TDD, architecture review, planning, git workflow, etc.). Read the upstream README first. Let the user pick which sub-skills to install, or install the set. Copy each chosen skill folder as-is with the MIT notice when the README calls for file copying.
